title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.700 - Water supply — authorization to regulate and license
text:
71.700.  Water supply — authorization to regulate and license. — All cities in this state have power and authority to regulate and license and to levy and collect license tax on all springs, wells or other sources of water supply from which water is sold to the public or offered or shipped for sale, and to inspect the same and analyze such waters.
(RSMo 1939 § 7353) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7202; 1919 § 8682; 1909 § 9559
